name: PT Transkon Jaya Tbk
summary: PT Transkon Jaya Tbk engages in the rental and lease without option rights for cars, buses, trucks, and others. The company rents light vehicles, light trucks and buses, manhauls, ambulance, service bodies, rescue vehicles, and other specialist vehicles. It also provides special vehicles with double and single cabin modification units for service units, palfinger cranes, heavy duty trays, drop side trays, and rescue units; and various accessories. The company serves mining, oil and gas, and construction industries. It also offers internet network, internet and communications, and IT and computer services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Balikpapan, Indonesia. PT Transkon Jaya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Damai Investa Sukses.
